name: Donald Trump
bio: 47th and current President of the United States, having returned to the White House in January 2025. His second term has been defined by aggressive tariff policy, the 2026 Iran war, AI export controls, and a public campaign against the Federal Reserve's leadership.

quotes.text: Talks are continuing on ending the war. Hopefully, it is the beginning of the end of a very long, deadly, and hard fought War.
They want to make a deal. We've had very good talks with Iran over the last 24 hours, and it's very possible that we'll make a deal. The war will be over quickly.
We've had very good talks with Iran over the past 24 hours, and it's very possible we'll make a deal — but if not, the bombing will be at a much higher level.
If China is caught supplying weapons to Iran, they get a 50% tariff. That's it. Simple.
Iran's response to our peace proposal was totally unacceptable. The ceasefire is on massive life support.
Iran's response was stupid and totally unacceptable. We are seriously looking at all options. The ceasefire is on massive life support.
I'll have a long talk about Iran with President Xi, but the main focus will be trade.
Boeing wanted 150, they got 200. The relationship between China and the USA is going to be better than ever before.
quotes.source: Fox News / Sean Hannity interview excerpt
quotes.topic: Trump-Xi summit Boeing deal and bilateral framing
